Aboutme

I build intelligent systems at the intersection of machine learning and data engineering. My work spans the full model lifecycle — from data preprocessing and feature engineering through architecture selection, training, evaluation, and deployment.

Currently contributing across four active internships — AI engineering at Syntecxhub, machine learning at Future Interns, cloud computing at CodeAlpha, and technical content at GAOTek — while completing my BSc in Computer Science.

My stack covers Python, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, FastAPI, and cloud platforms, with hands-on experience shipping production NLP pipelines, AI expert systems, a full-stack genomics platform, and forecasting dashboards.

Syntecxhub

Artificial Intelligence Intern
  • Developed and evaluated supervised ML models on structured datasets using Python, Scikit-learn, and TensorFlow — iterating on feature engineering, hyperparameter tuning, and model selection to achieve measurable accuracy improvements

Work

Selected Projects

01
AIExpert SystemJavaScriptHTMLCSSInference Engine

Medical Expert System — Forward Chaining Inference Engine

AI-powered medical diagnostic system that replicates real-world clinical reasoning using a forward chaining inference engine with 32 curated logical rules spanning syndromes, diagnoses, and treatments. Accepts symptom input in two modes — manual tag selection and guided interview mode — then iteratively fires matching rules to derive new medical facts. Outputs confidence-scored diagnoses with full inference trace, session metrics, and critical alert detection for high-severity symptom combinations.

32-rule inference engine · Confidence scoring · Critical alerts · Dual input mode
02
AINLPTF-IDFLogistic RegressionReact

Lexara — AI-Powered Sentiment Intelligence Platform

Real-time AI sentiment intelligence platform that reads the emotion behind any text — reviews, messages, or comments. Built entirely from scratch without external ML libraries: implements TF-IDF vectorisation, Logistic Regression with softmax probability outputs, and Naïve Bayes in pure JavaScript. Classifies text as positive, negative, or neutral with live confidence scores, per-token feature contribution breakdown, session-based analysis history, and an interactive 3D globe that dynamically reacts to detected sentiment. Evaluated with Precision, Recall, and F1 Score across a benchmarking dashboard.

3-class AI classifier · Built from scratch · Live inference · 3D dashboard
03
PythonNLPTF-IDFScikit-learnStreamlit

Clarix — Support Ticket Classification System

Production-grade NLP system automating support ticket triage through simultaneous dual-output classification — predicting both ticket category and priority level in a single pass. Engineered a TF-IDF vectorisation pipeline with tokenisation, stopword removal, and lemmatisation feeding into dual Logistic Regression heads across 600 labelled tickets, 6 categories, and 3 priority tiers. Benchmarked rigorously against Random Forest, Naive Bayes, and LinearSVC via 5-fold cross-validation; deployed as an interactive Streamlit dashboard with live inference, confidence scoring, and real-time results display.

Dual-output classifier · 5-fold CV · Live Streamlit dashboard
04
PythonTF-IDFCosine SimilarityStreamlit

Resume Screener — Automated Candidate Ranking

NLP-driven candidate screening system using a two-signal composite scoring model that combines TF-IDF cosine similarity between the resume and job description with weighted keyword skill matching (Final Score = 0.5 × TF-IDF + 0.5 × Weighted Skill Score). Supports both PDF and plain-text ingestion for flexible input handling. Outputs a ranked candidate leaderboard with individual scores, per-candidate skill gap analysis identifying missing competencies, and match strength labels — deployed as a live Streamlit application with real-time scoring.

2-signal composite model · PDF & TXT ingestion · Skill gap analysis
05
PythonPandasScikit-learnLinear Regression

InsightFlow — Sales Forecasting Dashboard

End-to-end ML forecasting on Superstore data (2014–2017) with lagged signals, rolling averages, and seasonality decomposition. Linear Regression (R²=0.600) generating 6-month demand projections with interactive business dashboard.

R² = 0.600 · 6-month projections · Business insight summaries
06
CloudJavaScriptHTML/CSSGitHub Pages

CloudBus — International Bus Pass System

Cloud-powered international bus ticket booking platform engineered to eliminate traditional pain points — ticket loss, incorrect pricing, and system downtime. Features a multi-step booking flow covering route selection, departure scheduling, and payment across one-way, return, weekly, and monthly subscription pass types. Security-first architecture with tamper-proof QR passes cryptographically signed on every scan, PCI DSS Level 1-compliant payment integration, 256-bit AES encryption, and a price lock guarantee that eliminates surge pricing. Delivered 99.97% platform uptime across 340+ international routes.

99.97% uptime · 340+ routes · Cryptographic ticket signing
07
PythonFastAPIPostgreSQLReactRailway

GeneView — DNA Sequence Viewer

Full-stack genomics research platform enabling scientists and researchers to upload, visualise, and analyse DNA sequences in FASTA and CSV formats. Integrates live with the NCBI Gene Database API to fetch real gene sequences in real time. Performs automated mutation detection — classifying changes as transitions or transversions — alongside GC content calculation and open reading frame identification. Built with a FastAPI + SQLAlchemy backend, PostgreSQL for persistent sequence storage, and a responsive HTML/CSS/JavaScript frontend; backend deployed on Railway, frontend on Netlify for full public accessibility.

Full-stack · NCBI API · Mutation detection · Railway + Netlify
